name_en: Top-tier Original M63801 Wavy Black. As a card case, it is really usable. The design is simple, atmospheric, and stylish, with excellent capacity. It gives a professional and steady impression when presenting your business card! With the development of the digital era, cash and bank cards are carried less, and small wallets are increasingly favored! This wallet is unbeatable as a small wallet; it can hold bank cards and bills without any issues. Compact and space-saving, it is convenient for daily bag use or carrying on your person. A classic style that is popular and timeless, looking good in anyone's hands! Dimensions: 10.8 x 8 x 1cm
